productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Press Black Sports Shoes
description: The nike Air Press is a fantabulous Basketball shoe that features a full length nike Air sole for complete cushioned support that offers lasting comfort on the court and off it too. UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations and mesh panels around the collar for enhanced lightweight comfort, breathability and styleLace-ups for a snug Fit Cushioned tongue and collar for all-day comfortMidsolePadded sockliner for all day comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionFull length air unit for enhanced cushioningOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for ease of movementWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
